name: Yunnan Chihong Zinc & Germanium Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Chihong Zinc & Germanium Co., Ltd. engages in the exploration, mining, processing, and trading of minerals in Japan. The company offers lead, zinc, hot-dip galvanized alloy, and cast zinc alloy ingots; and small metals, such as high-purity cerium oxide, zone smelting ingots, high-purity germanium tetrachloride, single-crystal, bismuth ingots, cadmium ingots, and indium ingots. It also provides precious metals, including gold and silver ingots; and chemical products comprising sulfuric acid, zinc sulfate water, ammonium sulfate, and industrial sulfur. The company was founded in 1951 and is based in Qujing, China.
